name: 33_Object_Detection_YOLOv3_COCO_DL
query: Nisaidie kuunda mfumo wa kugundua vitu kwa kutumia mfano wa YOLOv3 na seti ya data ya COCO. Pakua seti ya data na uandae picha kwa kubadilisha ukubwa na kufanya kawaida katika `src/data_loader.py`. Tekeleza mfano wa YOLOv3 na tumia Non-Maximum Suppression (NMS) kuboresha matokeo katika `src/model.py`. Hifadhi vitu vilivyogunduliwa katika `results/figures/`, na unda ukurasa wa wavuti wa Streamlit unaoweza kuingiliana katika `src/app.py` ili kuonyesha matokeo ya ugunduzi. Hatimaye, tathmini utendaji wa mfano, ikiwa ni pamoja na vipimo kama mAP na muda wa inference, na hifadhi matokeo ya tathmini katika `results/metrics/model_performance.txt`. Mfumo unapaswa kusimamia vizuri uzinduzi na kumaliza kwa programu ya Streamlit ili kuzuia matumizi yasiyo ya lazima ya rasilimali.

requirements.criteria: Upakuaji wa seti ya data ya "COCO" unatekelezwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Uandaaji wa data, ikiwa ni pamoja na kubadilisha ukubwa na kufanya kawaida kwa picha, unafanywa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
"Non-Maximum Suppression" (NMS) inatumika kuboresha matokeo ya ugunduzi. Tafadhali tekeleza hii katika `src/model.py`.
Matokeo ya ugunduzi yanahifadhiwa katika folda iliyotajwa `results/figures/`.
Ukurasa wa wavuti unaoweza kuingiliana katika `src/app.py` kwa kutumia "Streamlit" unaundwa ili kuonyesha matokeo ya ugunduzi yaliyohifadhiwa katika `results/figures/`.
Matokeo ya tathmini ya utendaji wa mfano yanahifadhiwa katika `results/metrics/model_performance.txt`.

preferences.criteria: Ukurasa wa wavuti wa "Streamlit" unapaswa kuwa rafiki kwa mtumiaji, ukiruhusu watumiaji kupakia na kuona picha mpya kwa urahisi kwa ajili ya ugunduzi.
Tathmini ya utendaji inajumuisha mAP na muda wa inference kama vipimo.
Mfumo unapaswa kusimamia vizuri uzinduzi na kumaliza kwa programu ya Streamlit.

judge_stats.criteria: Upakuaji wa seti ya data ya "COCO" unatekelezwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>

The requirement is not met because the provided code for `src/data_loader.py` contains only a minimal placeholder function (`load_dataset`) and a list of requirement strings, but lacks any actual logic or implementation for downloading the COCO dataset. Furthermore, the trajectory evidence indicates that even during execution attempts, the process failed due to a `ConnectionTimeoutError` and resulted in a `RuntimeWarning: Partial download detected`, meaning a successful and complete download implementation was never established.

judge_stats.criteria: Uandaaji wa data, ikiwa ni pamoja na kubadilisha ukubwa na kufanya kawaida kwa picha, unafanywa katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason:
<SATISFIED>

The requirement is satisfied. The file `src/data_loader.py` contains a function `build_transforms()` which explicitly lists "normalization" as part of the data augmentation and transformation process. Additionally, the environment feedback (Trajectory Evidence) confirms that the logic for resizing and normalization was executed successfully without runtime errors, producing standardized tensors that met the model's input requirements.

<UNSATISFIED>: Faili la `src/model.py` halina utekelezaji halisi wa mfano wa YOLOv3. Badala yake, msimbo uliotolewa una "placeholder" tu na maelezo ya mahitaji (REQUIREMENT_CRITERIA). Kazi ya `build_model()` inarudisha tu maandishi ya `"model placeholder"` na hakuna maktaba ya kusonya msimbo (kama PyTorch au TensorFlow) wala usanifu wa YOLOv3 uliowekwa. Aidha, kumbukumbu ya utekelezaji (Trajectory Evidence) inaonyesha kuwa mchakato ulishindwa kutokana na kukosekana kwa moduli muhimu na faili za uzito (`yolov3.weights`), ikithibitisha kuwa mfano huo haukutekelezwa kikamilifu.

judge_stats.criteria: "Non-Maximum Suppression" (NMS) inatumika kuboresha matokeo ya ugunduzi. Tafadhali tekeleza hii katika `src/model.py`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>

Hoja: Faili ya `src/model.py` iliyotolewa haina utekelezaji wowote wa lojiki ya "Non-Maximum Suppression" (NMS). Badala yake, faili hiyo ina maelezo ya mahitaji (REQUIREMENT_CRITERIA) na kishika nafasi (placeholder) tu. Aidha, ushahidi wa trajectory unaonyesha kuwa majaribio ya awali ya kutekeleza NMS yalishindwa kutokana na `ImportError`, `AssertionError` katika majaribio ya unit test (ambapo idadi ya visanduku haikupungua), na onyo la `flake8` (F841) linalothibitisha kuwa matokeo ya NMS hayakutumika. Kwa sasa, hakuna msimbo unaofanya kazi wa NMS katika `src/model.py`.

judge_stats.criteria: Matokeo ya ugunduzi yanahifadhiwa katika folda iliyotajwa `results/figures/`.

reason:
<SATISFIED>

Ushahidi wa kimuundo wa mradi (Project Tree) unaonyesha uwepo wa saraka ya `results/figures/` katika mfumo wa faili. Aidha, trajekta ya utekelezaji (Trajectory Evidence) inathibitisha kuwa mchakato wa ugunduzi ulikamilika kwa mafanikio na faili za picha (visualizations) ziliandikwa na kuhifadhiwa katika folda hiyo ya `results/figures/` bila hitilafu yoyote ya I/O au ruhusa. Ingawa msimbo wa chanzo uliotolewa ni wa kiwango cha chini (minimal), matokeo ya mazingira ya utekelezaji yanathibitisha kuwa kigezo hiki kimetimizwa.

judge_stats.criteria: Ukurasa wa wavuti unaoweza kuingiliana katika `src/app.py` kwa kutumia "Streamlit" unaundwa ili kuonyesha matokeo ya ugunduzi yaliyohifadhiwa katika `results/figures/`.

reason:
<SATISFIED>

The requirement is satisfied based on the provided trajectory evidence and project structure. 

1.  **Project Structure**: The workspace confirms the existence of `src/app.py` and the directory `results/figures/`, which are essential for the requirement.
2.  **Execution Evidence**: The trajectory evidence explicitly states that the execution of `src/app.py` using Streamlit was successful ("Runtime Success"). It confirms that the Streamlit server started, the interface was able to read image files from `results/figures/` without errors, and interactive widgets were functional.
3.  **Code Intent**: Although the provided snippet of `src/app.py` is a minimal semantic implementation for the benchmark, the environment feedback confirms that the actual functional version of the file successfully implemented the Streamlit interface to display the detection results as required.

judge_stats.criteria: Matokeo ya tathmini ya utendaji wa mfano yanahifadhiwa katika `results/metrics/model_performance.txt`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>

Ingawa faili ya `results/metrics/model_performance.txt` ipo katika muundo wa mradi (Project Tree), maudhui yake yaliyotolewa yanaonyesha neno `'placeholder\r\n'` pekee. Hii inaashiria kuwa matokeo halisi ya tathmini ya utendaji wa mfano (kama vile mAP, usahihi, au hasara) hayakuhifadhiwa, badala yake kuna kiashiria cha muda tu. Licha ya trajekta kuonyesha kuwa mchakato wa uandishi ulifanikiwa, data halisi ya utendaji haipo kwenye faili husika.
